failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing two matching items and produced an answer claiming there were none.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked which available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight cost more than $233.90. The plan and tool invocation were aligned with that goal. At index 3, the ProductCatalogSearch tool returned count=2 with two matching available items priced 272.33 and 237.48. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer: 'No items match that filter above the given price.' This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator also approved the incorrect answer.
